content.en:
Dark Forbidden Realm.

Dozens of forbidden places, each of which has poured out a large number of exotic powerhouses, entering all parts of the dark forbidden land, obliterating countless living beings.

Even the three thousand evil clans of the Dark Destruction Domain were all ants in front of these foreign powerhouses, and they had no power to resist at all.

Three thousand evil clans live by destruction, but now, they have been destroyed by foreign powerhouses.

Dark Destruction Domain, Dark Sanctuary, Dark Soul Domain......

Countless creatures in the dark holy places were wiped out, and countless resources were taken away by these foreign powerhouses.

The entire Dark Forbidden Domain is full of fighting, no, it should be said that the creatures of the Dark Forbidden Domain are slaughtered, even ordinary ancestors, once they are discovered by foreign powerhouses, they will be easily killed.

In a short period of time, almost all the ordinary creatures in the Dark Forbidden Realm were killed, and the ancestors also fell a lot.

Outside the realm of Daoshan.

An Ancestor tried to escape into Terran territory, but was stopped by the Terran array.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, save me!"

An Ancestor cries for help.

However, the ancestors of the human race had no idea of saving each other at all.

After all, the most important thing for the Terrans is to survive this catastrophe, and once they survive this catastrophe, the Terrans will almost certainly rise and take off.

Therefore, it is not important to survive the catastrophe.

This ancestor has nothing to do with the human race, so naturally he will not offend foreign forces for this ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

A supreme-level exotic powerhouse descended and killed the ancestor with one hand.

This supreme-level exotic powerhouse looked at the Terran territory in this area of the Daoshan Realm, looked at the dense array, hesitated for a moment, and did not make a move immediately, but summoned other exotic powerhouses.

Before, although Ye Tian had broken into many forbidden places, there were some forbidden places that he had never entered, so the forces behind these forbidden places did not know Ye Tian's strength at all.

Exotic powerhouses who knew Ye Tian's strength, if they inquired a little, they would not come to invade the territory of the human race.

But the foreign forces who didn't know Ye Tian's strength saw the Terran territory and thought that the resources here were very rich, so they naturally wanted to invade the Terran territory.

This supreme-level exotic powerhouse belonged to a daimyo-level exotic powerhouse, Chaotian Pavilion.

Soon, a powerhouse with a name comparable to the Supreme Ancestor level came outside the territory of the Terran Race.

In a short period of time, there were nine supreme-level beings gathered here, and among them was a second-level supreme-level powerhouse.

"Dragon Film, why did you summon us?"

A supreme-level existence in Chaotian Pavilion asked.

The supreme-level powerhouse named Dragon Membrane spoke: "This is the territory of the strongest human race in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and I suspect that there is a supreme ancestor among them, so I didn't do it immediately!"

"Terran? The last great tribulation did not have this force, it should be a new force, it is difficult to leave the dark forbidden domain for a period of great tribulation, even if there is an opportunity, the birth of a supreme ancestor is estimated to be the limit! And the birth of the supreme ancestor is estimated to be the strongest ancestor who inherits the inheritance and promotion of the supreme powerhouse, and the combat power is very weak, not worth mentioning!"

"That's right, what is a mere human race? with the strength of our Chaotian Pavilion, we can easily destroy him!"

"Let's hurry up, if the six super-famous forces such as the Calamity Black Mountain make a move, we won't even be able to get any benefits!"

After a few brief discussions, these supreme beings decided to take action against the Terrans.

Bang!!!!!

One after another, the supreme aura spread, enveloping the entire Terran territory.

Those formations began to tremble under the coercion of these supreme beings.

These supreme-level powerhouses don't want to wipe out the Terrans at once, otherwise they will wipe out a lot of resources as well, and the loss will be great.

Therefore, they first beheaded the ancestors of the Terrans, and then erased the souls of countless Terrans with one thought, so that they could collect the resources and treasures of the Terrans without destroying any resources.

However, just as they were attacking the Terran formation, a majestic figure appeared outside the Terran territory.

Ye Tian's body stood here, staring at these Chaotian Pavilion powerhouses.

Their attack was directly blocked by Ye Tian, and there was no way to attack the Terran formation at all.

The next moment.

Ye Tian made a move, and the Hegemony Supreme Ancestral Technique combined with the Extreme Arm Supreme Ancestral Technique, and blasted over with one punch.

This punch seemed to have wiped out everything, causing many of Chaotian Pavilion's supreme beings to be terrified.

"Run!"

They were terrified.

Ye Tian's blow was too terrifying, beyond their imagination, they had never seen such a terrifying powerhouse, even the third-level supreme powerhouse didn't have such a powerful aura.

Click!!!

A supreme-level existence was shattered by Ye Tian's fist power and was completely killed.

In the blink of an eye, there was only one second-level supreme powerhouse remaining.

This supreme-level existence wanted to break the time and space and escape, but Ye Tian had already blocked the time and space.

If you can't break time and space and escape, you can only rely on speed, but where is his speed as fast as Ye Tian, he can easily catch up.

"Eternal Supreme Ancestral Technique!"

The terrifying rules of time shrouded this Chaotian Pavilion second-level supreme powerhouse existence, under the time system eternal supreme ancestral technique, time was frozen, although he could sense the solidification of time, but he couldn't react, his entire body seemed to be frozen, uncontrollable.

The next moment.

Ye Tian's palm fell, directly killing this supreme-level existence.

At this point, all the supreme level existences of Chaotian Pavilion were completely wiped out.

This is naturally a huge loss for Chaotian Pavilion, and I don't know how long it will take to recover.

After killing these Chaotian Pavilion's supreme-level existences, Ye Tian harvested the treasures on their bodies.

"Hey, there are even three Origin Rule Heist Crystals!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

These Origin Rule Robbery Crystals are naturally not the Origin Rule Robbery Crystals of the Sacred Domain Heaven and Earth, but other Exotic Heavens and Earths, which are carried by these supreme-level existences, but they did not expect that they would fall in the Dark Forbidden Domain, otherwise they would definitely not be sent to death with these three Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

With these three Exotic Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals, Ye Tian could be regarded as making a lot of money.

Ye Tian made a move to kill Chaotian Pavilion's supreme-level existence, but it did not attract the attention of others, after all, there were no other supreme-level existences in this area, so the news was not leaked.

In the following days, from time to time, there were supreme-level beings attacking the territory of the human race, and they were all killed by Ye Tian.

Gradually, the news leaked out, and the strength of the Terrans was exposed.

And I don't know what the reason is, the supreme-level existence of the six super-name-level forces is not keen on looking for opportunities, but looking for something.

For this information, Ye Tian was also a little curious.

"What are the six major forces looking for? Could it be that the mysterious treasure is the real purpose of the six major forces!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
